标题: Leather Craft Tools: Edge Kote/ Edge Paint Finishing 20ml OR Applicators (20pcs) by Jason & Sherron Handmade
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "[Edge Kote 20ml] Edge Kote is applied to the edges of leather to obtain a pleasing finishing from the raw edges of belts, bags, wallets and shoes etc, finishing your edges will drastically improve the quality of your work. They are also very flexible and will provide a durable edge protection of your leather goods. Each 20ml bottle comes with 4 applicators, you may purchase more applicators too. How to use: - Even the edges as flat as possible with a knife or sandpaper - Shake the bottle well - Apply Preparatore Neutro Filler (optional) to fill up any gaps - Apply a thin and smooth layer of Edge Kote to the edge using the applicator - After it dries, sand slightly and apply Edge Kote again - Repeat above step until desired outcome - Buff it with a piece of canvas - Do remember to wash or soak the applicator in water to prevent the sponge from hardening after using. Colour Options: Black Matt Brandy Light Brown Bright Red Daphne Blue Midnight Blue Deep Dark Brown White Matt Shiny Finishing (transparent and gives a shiny finishing) Preparatore Neutro Filler (act like a primer) ​ You may also mix the Edge Kote to achieve your desired colour or tone. [Edge Kote Applicator] To apply Edge Kote onto the edges of your leather work. Comes in bundle of 20. Do remember to wash or soak the applicator in water to prevent the sponge from hardening. [Disclaimer] Colours and textures may vary slightly from what you see on screen."}]

[Edge Kote 20ml]

Edge Kote is applied to the edges of leather to obtain a pleasing finishing from the raw edges of belts, bags, wallets and shoes etc, finishing your edges will drastically improve the quality of your work. They are also very flexible and will provide a durable edge protection of your leather goods.

Each 20ml bottle comes with 4 applicators, you may purchase more applicators too.

How to use:

- Even the edges as flat as possible with a knife or sandpaper

- Shake the bottle well

- Apply Preparatore Neutro Filler (optional) to fill up any gaps

- Apply a thin and smooth layer of Edge Kote to the edge using the applicator

- After it dries, sand slightly and apply Edge Kote again

- Repeat above step until desired outcome

- Buff it with a piece of canvas

- Do remember to wash or soak the applicator in water to prevent the sponge from hardening after using.

Colour Options:

  • Black Matt
  • Brandy Light Brown
  • Bright Red
  • Daphne Blue
  • Midnight Blue
  • Deep Dark Brown
  • White Matt
  • Shiny Finishing (transparent and gives a shiny finishing)
  • Preparatore Neutro Filler (act like a primer)

    ​

You may also mix the Edge Kote to achieve your desired colour or tone.

[Edge Kote Applicator]

To apply Edge Kote onto the edges of your leather work. Comes in bundle of 20. Do remember to wash or soak the applicator in water to prevent the sponge from hardening.

[Disclaimer]

Colours and textures may vary slightly from what you see on screen.
